name: Kanpur Plastipack Limited
summary: Kanpur Plastipack Limited manufactures and exports flexible intermediate bulk containers (FIBC) worldwide. It also provides small polypropylene (PP)/HDPE woven sacks and bags, including laminated and unlaminated, printed and unprinted, box bags and bale wraps, pallet covers, food grain bags, fertilizer bags, and cement bags, as well as liner and gusseted bags, valve bags, and bale wraps. In addition, the company offers PP/HDPE woven fabrics, such as laminated, unlaminated, circular, and circular cut open fabrics; and various accessories for use in the manufacture of FIBCs and woven bags comprising webbings, PP filler cords, dust proof cords, tie strings, B-locks, and Velcro. Further, it provides ventilated interlocked, ventilated without interlocked, conductive, and food grade fabrics; and a range of PP multi filament yarns for use in various industries. The company was founded in 1971 and is based in Kanpur, India.
